headline: Expanded Actinium‑225 Capacity And Higher EPS Guidance Could Be A Game Changer For Cardinal Health (CAH)
summary: In early April 2026, Cardinal Health announced a major expansion of Actinium-225 production at its Center for Theranostics Advancement in Indianapolis, adding a high-capacity line to its Drug Master File to boost cGMP-compliant supply for investigational and future commercial targeted alpha therapies worldwide. This expansion, which has already supported more than 15 clinical trials and growing global demand, underscores Cardinal Health’s emerging role as a key enabler of next-generation...
